title: SHIFA HEALING CENTER - 211info
text: MULTI-COUNTY OFFICE SHIFA HEALING CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides holistic mental health and substance abuse services. 2110 SE 82nd Avenue Portland, OR 97216 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Walk in: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm By appointment only: Saturday-Sunday, no standard hours Email (971) 254-8916 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 254-8916 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for appointment FEES: Varies by service. OHP and other major insurance plans accepted. DOCUMENTS: Insurance card LANGUAGES: English, Amharic, Somali, Swahili AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Services: Community Mental Health Agencies Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - UPLIFT HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - BRIDGE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
